title: Movies reminding you of NGE
wikitext:
[]: Movies reminding you of NGE             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Mar 06, 2011 4:59 pm Hey guys, I just saw the movie called Legion (which, if you like action, pretty cool. The plot, although, horrid). At this point of the movie, there is a guy (Micheal) that explains that they have to protect this baby from the Angels and their minions, otherwise Humanity is doomed. Doesn't this scream "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION" to you? Just a little? Anyways, have you seen a movie that reminds you of NGE?

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Sun Mar 06, 2011 9:23 pm The filler flashback episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood (episode 27) was very NGE e26. Hohenheim faces some of his inner demons in his mind via all sorts of flashbacks. At the end of the episode, a bunch of characters pop up out of no where and encourages him. There's also a chapter of BLEACH manga where they contain a character in a crucifix, EoE style.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Sun Mar 06, 2011 11:25 pm Love & Pop and Shiki-Jitsu. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Movies reminding you of NGE             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 07, 2011 1:11 am Stryker wrote: Doesn't this scream "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION" to you?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Mon Mar 07, 2011 2:22 am In the reverse direction, I knew where I'd "known" the Eva characters before I met them - "Come die with me!" ~ Mal from "Inception" was one hell of a primer for Kyoko... And the sharp-edged "twang" that occasionally showed up in Asuka's voice reminded me of Astrid (voiced by America Ferrera) from "How to Train Your Dragon."

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Mon Mar 07, 2011 6:33 am One movie that made me think of Evangelion was Synecdoche, New York - but I can't properly explain why. It's a very general mish-mashed impression based on some superficial similarities in storytelling, I guess.

[]: Re: Movies reminding you of NGE             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Mon Mar 07, 2011 11:32 am Stryker wrote: Hey guys, I just saw the movie called Legion (which, if you like action, pretty cool. The plot, although, horrid). At this point of the movie, there is a guy (Micheal) that explains that they have to protect this baby from the Angels and their minions, otherwise Humanity is doomed. Doesn't this scream "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION" to you? Just a little? Anyways, have you seen a movie that reminds you of NGE?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 07, 2011 12:44 pm BornIn1142 wrote: One movie that made me think of Evangelion was Synecdoche, New York - but I can't properly explain why. It's a very general mish-mashed impression based on some superficial similarities in storytelling, I guess.

[]: Re: Movies reminding you of NGE             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Mar 07, 2011 3:05 pm Stryker wrote: Doesn't this scream "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION" to you?

[]: Re: Movies reminding you of NGE             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Mar 07, 2011 6:37 pm Killer Bee wrote: No it does not. That movie sucked hard.

[]: Gabriel was played by Patrick Warburton, right? Right?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Mar 07, 2011 6:54 pm Stryker wrote: Don't get me wrong, it was horrible.

[]: Re: Gabriel was played by Patrick Warburton, right? Right?             Quote Post by Stryker » Tue Mar 08, 2011 9:44 pm Killer Bee wrote: Oh, thank God. I thought you were implying it was good or something. Yeah... no. You mean Armageddon? Wait.. whats Armageddon? I... I don't even know where you're going with this. Are you drawing parallels between the Chosen One baby in Legion and Adam from NGE? Regardless, I don't see how such an overused, hackneyed plot device could remind me specifically of Eva. I am. And I think your mixing the overused, hackneyed plot device to be "You must save/protect this thing, or we are all screwed", when it is actually "You must save us because you are awesome. If you don't, we are all screwed" . The scary one in all the previews who opened his mouth real wide and got on all fours like a spider? And was then easily killed five seconds later by a shotgun or something? I don't remember anything like that in NGE. Remember the episode in which the power at Nerv went offline, and there was the huge spider Angel that spit acid everywhere (Which infact, did died five seconds later.. from an assault rifle)? Yeah, that reminded me of the evil ice-cream man.

[]:             Quote Post by Alastor » Sat Mar 26, 2011 9:08 pm RahXephon. It can basicly be summed up as "Evangelion - Depression + Yuusha Raideen".

[]:             Quote Post by CORE » Sat Apr 09, 2011 2:20 am Enter the Void .. is the closest thing to live action evangelion right now i think. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enter_the_Void

[]:             Quote Post by braveheart » Sun Apr 17, 2011 6:00 am Legion it is!

[]:             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Fri Aug 02, 2013 11:45 pm Please excuse me while I resurrect this topic really quick...I saw the movie Only God Forgives a couple weeks ago, (and if you don't want me to spoil the movie, refrain from opening the spoiler box(duh)) SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Sat Aug 03, 2013 9:37 pm CORE wrote: Enter the Void .. is the closest thing to live action evangelion right now i think. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enter_the_Void

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Aug 12, 2013 6:22 am What, no one cited Pacific Rim yet? There is one scene that really made me think of Eva, in a very humorous way : SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Tue Aug 13, 2013 6:24 am Nice topic. David Fincher's Fight Club . Ingman Bergman's Persona . Akira Kurosawa's Nora Inu . Stanley Kubrick's 2001 , Barry Lyndon , Eyes Wide Shut , and Lolita Hayao Miyazaki's Nausicaa :P Darren Aronofsky's Black Swan , The Fountain , and Pi Also, Sweeney Todd and The Phantom of the Opera

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Tue Aug 13, 2013 11:00 am Dream wrote: David Fincher's Fight Club .
